/**
 * FULLCALENDAR LIBRARY PLACEHOLDER
 * 
 * This directory should contain the FullCalendar library files.
 * FullCalendar is licensed under MIT and is free to use.
 * 
 * INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
 * 
 * 1. Download FullCalendar v6.1.10 from: https://fullcalendar.io/
 * 2. Extract the following files to this directory:
 *    - fullcalendar.min.js
 *    - fullcalendar.min.css
 * 
 * OR use CDN by modifying schedule-collaboration-tracking.php:
 * 
 * Replace the enqueue_script calls with CDN links:
 * 
 * // FullCalendar CSS
 * wp_enqueue_style(
 *     'srt-fullcalendar',
 *     'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.10/index.global.min.css',
 *     array(),
 *     '6.1.10'
 * );
 * 
 * // FullCalendar JS
 * wp_enqueue_script(
 *     'srt-fullcalendar',
 *     'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.10/index.global.min.js',
 *     array(),
 *     '6.1.10',
 *     true
 * );
 * 
 * LICENSE: MIT
 * Website: https://fullcalendar.io/
 */
